description: Unpack an Office workbook (.xlsx/.docx/.pptx) ZIP archive into a pretty-printed XML directory tree for editing.
rules: read-only on the source — extracts the ZIP into a fresh directory, never modifies OFFICE_FILE
pretty-prints every .xml/.rels file (indented) and escapes smart quotes
DOCX-only extras: merges adjacent runs with identical formatting and simplifies adjacent tracked changes (no-op for .xlsx)
unpacked tree written under record_store/unpacked/; a JSON summary is written to unpack.json
usage: Set OFFICE_FILE (path to the .xlsx/.docx/.pptx). Output: unpack.json (summary) + record_store/unpacked/ (the XML tree).
limitation: Requires defusedxml (and, for DOCX run-merging, lxml). Without defusedxml the perk still emits valid JSON but cannot pretty-print. Only .xlsx/.docx/.pptx inputs are accepted.
